title: Uruguayan-Style Grilled Steak with Ikura Glaze
description: A flavorful and tender Uruguayan-style grilled steak dish, topped with a spicy ikura glaze, making it a perfect Italian-inspired dinner.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan steak
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality, grass-fed Uruguayan steak

instructions: Season the Uruguayan steak with peppery salt and bake garlic powder.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
Meanwhile, mix ikura with mellow olive oil in a small bowl.
Once the steak is cooked, brush the ikura glaze all over the top of the steak.
Transfer the steak to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and garnish with fresh parsley.
